title: Add Cloudflare configuration to an existing project
description: Wire wrangler.jsonc and the Cloudflare deploy/serve/types targets onto an existing Nx project. Framework-agnostic: bring your own framework adapter.

project.description: The existing Nx project to add Cloudflare configuration to.
project.x-prompt: Which project should Cloudflare be added to?

items.label: Worker — a plain Worker (your own entry)
Full-stack — static assets + an API Worker

name.description: The Worker name written to wrangler.jsonc. Defaults to the project name.

main.description: Worker entry point (project-relative). Ignored for the 'spa' template.

assetsDir.description: Static assets directory (project-relative). Used by 'spa' and 'fullstack'.
